name: pam-os-memory
description: Use PAM-OS local-first long-term memory from AI assistants and coding agents, including context prep for project troubleshooting, analysis, solving, optimization, and automatic post-answer capture of stable preferences and project decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first long-term memory for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: PAM-OS provides local SQLite-backed memory through skills, REST, and CLI adapters for preparing context before project troubleshooting, analysis, solving, optimization, and implementation work, automatically maintaining stable memories after answers, recording behavior choices, and reading profile traits. This manifest is the Codex adapter for the multi-client PAM-OS memory package.
defaultPrompt: Use PAM-OS memory for this task.
Prepare PAM-OS context before troubleshooting or analyzing this project.
Remember this project decision in PAM-OS.
Automatically capture stable preferences from this turn.
Prepare context from PAM-OS before answering.
